sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 13.50 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.13)

statement.latex: Let${ F}$be a local Fitting class. Is it true that there are no maximal elements in the partially ordered by inclusion set of the Fitting classes contained in${ F}$and distinct from${ F}$? { A.\,N.\,Skiba} No, there may exist maximal elements (N.\,V.\,Savel'eva, N.\,T.\,Vorob'ev, Siberian Math. J., { 49}, no.\,6 (2008), 1124--1130). %1411–1419

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
